## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Browser

- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Edge 120)
- **OS**: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **PG Patrol version**: (e.g., 1.0.0)

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the issue.

## Settings

- **Sensitivity level**: (Mild / Moderate / Strict)
- **Filters enabled**: (Text / Image / Good Vibes)
- **Custom words configured**: (Yes / No)
- **Site whitelisted**: (Yes / No)

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
